channel.title: Projects on Liang Qiao
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Liang Qiao

item.title: projects
item.description: Torch2Tensor 2023.3~2023.5 Torch nn.Module -> TVM Tensor program Github: https://github.com/qiaolian9/Torch2Tensor A easy tool for generating Tensor Program from Torch(besd on Torch FX & TVM Relax) FcTC-UNet 2021.11~2022.2 Fine-grained Combination of Transformer and CNN for Thoracic Organs Segmentation (accepted in EMBC22) URL: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9870880 PI-CAI 2022 Challenge URL: http://rumc-gcorg-p-public.s3.amazonaws.com/evaluation-supplementary/642/3057dc31-3a85-480f-8c6b-0da7d1327c48/Swangeese.pdf Github: https://github.com/Yukiya-Umimi/ITUNet-for-PICAI-2022-Challenge
